programme.title: The Cheetah Diaries
programme.desc: This time on the Cheetah Diaries, the six female cubs meet their future handler Tim, who will care for them at their new home - Bush Gardens in Tampa Bay, Florida.

programme.title: The Cheetah Diaries
programme.desc: It’s a flying start for the six female cheetah cubs, as they leave with new handler Tim to be ambassador cheetahs at Bush Gardens in Tampa Bay, Florida. After months caring for the cubs, the Cheetah Outreach team says a tearful goodbye.

programme.title: The Cheetah Diaries
programme.desc: This time on the Cheetah Diaries we join an excited Emily as she travels to collect four new cheetah ambassador hopefuls. We witness the end of an era as Angel and Melda retire from the Anatolian breeding dog programme.

programme.title: The Cheetah Diaries
programme.desc: This time on the Cheetah Diaries, big change is afoot. Cheetah Outreach has been given a big opportunity, but it will mean leaving their current home for a new location.

programme.title: THE BEST OF WORLDS: LIFE AT ITS ALPINE LIMITS
programme.desc: For 5000 years man has sought to inhabit the more accessible areas of Europe, but at its very heart, in the high zones of the Alps, there exists a world parallel to ours.

programme.title: The Adventures of America's Horses
programme.desc: These iconic American horses opened up routes through a continent and conquered its plains and unspoiled heart. Today, these untamed horses are fighting for their freedom and even their very survival in the wide open spaces of the American West.

programme.title: The Angel's Secret
programme.desc: Many know its name; few have seen it. Once present throughout Europe, the angel shark is now critically endangered and finds itself struggling off the coast of the Canary Islands. As unique as it is extraordinary, this species is full of secrets...

programme.title: Search for the Ghost Bears
programme.desc: Our film journey begins in Alaska's west. We are hoping to find glacier bears in the glacial regions of the Katmai National Park on the Douglas River.

programme.title: Secret Seychelles: D'Arros
programme.desc: D'Arros is one of the Seychelles' best kept secrets. Safe-guarded by isolation, the island is a jewel of the Indian Ocean.

programme.title: Roaring With Pride
programme.desc: The lions are on the hunt for giraffe. Meanwhile, researcher Rae accompanies the lions as they encounter nervy hartebeest. The game capture unit are tasked with supplying more zebra for the Ngama release site.

programme.title: Roaring With Pride
programme.desc: Phyre has to be darted to keep the balance in the pride healthy, while Pazza shows off her highly possessive nature with an unsuspecting tortoise. And Milo demonstrates why he wears the pants around here.

programme.title: Roaring With Pride
programme.desc: We follow the as they walk and stalk. Meat preparation gets weird for some as our volunteers make dinner time more interesting. A brave zebra stallion takes the fight to the ever confident lions.

programme.title: Roaring With Pride
programme.desc: The lions attempt to dig a stubborn warthog out of his hole, while an influx of volunteers have arrived and Nathan instructs them with an induction talk on how to treat, walk and cope with lions.

programme.title: Roaring With Pride
programme.desc: We get a first peek at the adorable additions in the denning enclosure. Lewa and Laili take their hunting skills to a new level and tackle a kudu, and we find out what Rae's doing with hyena poo!

programme.title: Roaring With Pride
programme.desc: Penya and Paza encounter a python; the adorable cubs go on their first bush outing; Lewa and Laili keep the zebra on their toes. Meanwhile, the research team have more experiments for the Ngamo lions.

programme.title: When Sharks Meets Croc
programme.desc: The most aggressive of ocean predators, the bull shark, is notorious for leaving the safety of the deep blue ocean, venturing far up the murky rivers of Africa's coast in search of prey.

programme.title: Step Up: High Water
programme.desc: Tensions flare at Dondre and Janelle's over-the-top party; Johnny forces Tal to face the truth about who he is.

programme.title: Step Up: High Water
programme.desc: Poppy and Janelle open up to one another; Rigo and Dondre grapple with the events of the party.

programme.title: Step Up: High Water
programme.desc: Rigo goes viral; King makes a big reveal to Poppy.

programme.title: Step Up: High Water
programme.desc: Sage Odom's tour auditions get underway; Uncle Al tries to save the twins; Collette and East-O's turbulent past comes to a head.

programme.title: Step Up: High Water
programme.desc: Realizing what it takes to become professional dance squad; Rigo has questions after Eart-o's death.

programme.title: Step Up: High Water
programme.desc: The rivalry between Tal and Zo comes to a head; Davis meets Odalie's parents.

programme.title: Greenleaf
programme.desc: It's the Greenleafs versus Harmony and Hope, and neither will go down without a fight; Grace fights to stop the demolition; Lady Mae tries to negotiate for the mansion, but a reveal about the original owner prompts Bishop to a revelation of his own.

programme.title: Greenleaf
programme.desc: Grace and the Greenleaf family must lay the past to rest once and for all as God's plans for the future unfold.

programme.title: Greenleaf
programme.desc: The news of Grace Greenleaf's return to Memphis breeds tension.

programme.title: Greenleaf
programme.desc: Grace's moving back to Memphis is motivated by vengeance for her sister's death; she struggles to work in the family's church.

programme.title: Greenleaf
programme.desc: Jacob and Kerissa realize what their marriage has become; Grace goes on an uncomfortable date; Senator Banks looks into the church's finances.

programme.title: Greenleaf
programme.desc: When the mayor cashes in a favor, the Bishop is left in a tough spot that could split the church; Grace is blackmailed; Charity can't keep a secret.

programme.title: Power
programme.desc: Mike and Angela hunt for the mole; Angela gets a lead, while she must solidify Tommy's alibi; Tasha receives a warning as Tariq makes a dangerous new friend; Milan issues an edict to push a new product.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A man dies in his home after a long history of heart disease. A few weeks after the funeral, rumors surface that the death was no accident.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 1999, a 12-year-old was found murdered in her Minnesota home. Despite a meticulous search of the home and an exhaustive investigation, police had no suspects.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 1962, the small town residents of Hanford, California lost their sense of peace when one of their own, 15-year-old Marlene Miller, was murdered.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A mother of two vanishes after a shopping trip. Her body is discovered a month later, and witnesses say they saw the victim being forced into a car by an unknown person.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A woman is shot to death in her store just one day before she is to testify against the man accused of robbing her. The robber becomes the prime suspect, but he has a solid alibi: a timestamped videotape of his activities on the day of the murder.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 1993, the state of Florida was known for more than just Disney World. Worldwide attention focused on a rash of robberies which targeted tourists. Some vacationers were killed in these attacks, but some fought and survived.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Investigators find a shoe print, several foreign hairs and unknown fingerprints at a murder scene. But they believe the most telling piece of evidence is the bite mark on the victim's chest.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A woman's death in Pennsylvania triggers a homicide investigation into another woman's death in North Carolina. Faced with striking similarities, examiners must determine if their suspect's story about accidental drowning is all wet.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A 34-year-old nurse experiences a variety of flu-like symptoms. None of her doctors are able to discover the cause, until she visits her gynecologist for a routine check-up.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Time of death becomes pivotal after a pregnant woman is found murdered in her air-conditioned bedroom. A striking similarity between her death and an HBO movie gives examiners the clues they need to thaw out the alibi of a cold-blooded killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: A Wrong Foot
programme.desc: Police were puzzled by an obscure print found at a crime scene where one man had been killed and two teenage girls were seriously injured. Neither of the girls could identify their attacker, but one simple clue helped track the footsteps of a killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Order Up
programme.desc: A man is found dead in his home and his ex-wife has a perfect alibi. To determine time of death, investigators need to know when the victim ate his last meal. An endocrinologist, a forensic botanist and a short-order cook answer their question.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Soon after organizing a workers' strike, a union official is executed in his home. Neither his wife nor anyone in the neighborhood hear any gunshots. It takes a forensic sound test, an electron microscope and a nightgown to explain why.

programme.title: Forensic Files: A Welcome Intrusion
programme.desc: A man tells police he shot an intruder who had attacked and murdered his wife. The husband paints a tragic picture and is dubbed a hero. Four years later, forensic evidence leads police to re-examine the motives of this so-called hero.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Within Arm's Reach
programme.desc: A police officer accused of killing his estranged wife insists she committed suicide. Investigators say it was murder — that it was physically impossible for the woman to have shot herself.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Firefighters find an entire family dead inside their home in an apparent murder-suicide, but there are several inconsistent clues in the rubble. Could ballistics, a time card and some secret audiotapes unravel the mystery?

programme.title: Forensic Files: Brotherhoods
programme.desc: Two men are murdered while sleeping in their beds. The next night, arson destroys a family planning clinic. Investigators wonder whether some shards of glass, paint chips and a chicken feather could link what appear to be two separate crimes.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Investigators are baffled after finding a murder scene devoid of any physical evidence, but they suspect that the victim's dog had witnessed the crime. If so, forensic scientists would have to find some way to learn what the dog had seen.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A young TV news producer is raped and murdered in her apartment. Police identify two suspects, but both are cleared of any wrongdoing. When the case stalls for more than a year, investigators turn to the Commonwealth of Virginia's DNA Databank.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Police are dispatched to the scene of a shooting and discover the victim's husband is one of their own: a homicide detective who says his wife accidentally shot herself in the head.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: For years, a woman suffered from what appeared to be the unpleasant side effects of lithium, a drug prescribed to treat bipolar disorder. When she died, investigators had to determine if her death was due to natural causes, suicide or murder.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A woman is found dead in a ravine, and crucial evidence has been washed away by severe thunderstorms. Twice, the trail turns cold. Almost 20 years later, an old hat and a chip of stainless steel brings the killer to justice.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: When an 11-year-old girl disappears from a remote Alaska town, investigators wonder if she has been attacked by a bear or become lost in the dense woods. Eventually, they realize that neither assumption is true.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Just weeks before a witness is to testify against the man accused of sexually assaulting her, she is murdered in the front yard of her own home. Investigators immediately suspect her attacker, but they don't have enough evidence to prove his guilt.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: For six years, a serial killer prowled the streets of New York City. He wrote letters to police and The New York Post, indicating he would kill twelve people — one for each astrological sign.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A healthy young man dies mysteriously in his sleep and toxicology tests reveal a lethal dose of lidocaine in his blood. Investigators find a suicide note and presume he killed himself until a forensic linguist examines the note.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In the summer of 1986, Kathleen Lipscomb's body was found on a deserted road outside of San Antonio. Months and years passed, but the crime was never solved. Finally, a private investigator discovered Kathleen's diary.

programme.desc: On their return from Hollywood, Lucy has her hands full with Ricky when he is hailed as a major celebrity. The Ricardos' neighbors join for a grand homecoming celebration and block party in Ricky's honor when the Ricardos and Mertze return together.

programme.title: I Love Lucy

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Ricky finds Lucy exhausted after a trying day with little Ricky and insists it is time their son started nursery school. Lucy's protests are overridden and Ricky takes young Ricky to nursery school, but the baby comes down with tonsillitis.

programme.title: I Love Lucy

programme.desc: Lucy anticipates a 2nd honeymoon with Ricky on their boat trip to Europe, but Ricky's band duties keep him too busy. Lucy happily looks forward to romantic evenings and daytime deck games on board the ship as the Ricardos and the Mertzes sail for Europe.

programme.title: Los archivos del FBI

programme.title: Los archivos del FBI

programme.title: Los archivos del FBI
programme.desc: En el suroeste, un ladrón en serie de bancos afirmaba que su botín era para los pobres, pero este ladrón no era ningún héroe popular, pues tenía un arma y estaba dispuesto a disparar.

programme.title: Los archivos del FBI

programme.title: Los archivos del FBI

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Abuelo se de cuenta que el y el Noruego pueden ser padre e hijo. Pitipú es atropellado.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Gaspar invita a la familia a un viaje muy especial para él. Peluzin se pega al plan.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Noruego y Peluzin empiezan un Boy Band, Gaspar se ve forzado a integrarse por problemas económicos. El Abuelo intenta comenzar una relación amorosa.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Camino a rentar una película, el Noruego adquiere una nueva mascota. En tanto, Peluzín tiene que mudarse de su departamento por falta de pago.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Abuelo despierta la curiosidad en el Noruego por conocer a su padre y este le pide ayuda a Gaspar para que lo acompañe en esta misión que ha hecho como su única prioridad. Mientras tanto el Abuelo encamina a Jonathan en su despertar sexual.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Abuelo y el Noruego buscan nuevos horizontes a través de la creación de una fundación, mientras Peluzín cae en la cuenta de su soledad y sale a buscar amigos.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Noruego emprende en un nuevo negocio con pulgas, mientras que el Abuelo y Jonathan son tomados como rehenes por unos crimínales en un asalto al banco.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Abuelo sufre un accidente y es llevado de emergencia al hospital pero no es posible la operación. Deciden esperar a que se cure solo, llevándose una sorpresa. Mientras tanto, Olaf decide pedirle ayuda escolar a Jonathan y termina por aprovecharse.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Noruego sigue con su plan de casarse con la Ivanka de cera, mientras que el Abuelo y Peluzín afianzan su relación después de su gran viaje

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Pitipú recibe una visita de su pasado el cual lleva muchos años tratando de dejar atrás, mientras que el Noruego se embarca en una búsqueda para conseguirle una madre a Olaf.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Irma organiza un club de peleas clandestinas, mientras que Pitipú decepcionado de sus conocimientos Bíblicos, decide embarcarse en el camino del mal.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Un extraño bebé aparece en la puerta de LFDB, quien viene acarreando una ola de destrucción. Ahora la salvación del mundo depende de la Familia del Barrio.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: La compañía donde trabaja Gaspar atraviesa un recorte de personal pero el es de los pocos afortunados que se salva y es mandado a una capacitación a Estados Unidos, mientras que Peluzín toma el papel de Gaspar en México.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Noruego está despilfarrando su fortuna peor que nunca, mientras que Pitipú, Don Sebas y Gaspar buscan solucionar el problema de plomería del edificio Pino.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Noruego no cumple con sus responsabilidades con la casa por lo que es expulsado por Gaspar. El Noruego se embarca en una travesía sin saber que lleva un ángel guardián.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Noruego está cansado de la mala racha que ha tenido con las mujeres y busca el consejo de Pitipú, mientras que Peluzín le pide ayuda a Jonathan para poder encontrar a su verdadero padre.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: La familia va a Washington a pedir la mano de Ivanka con un resultado inesperado, mientras que Johnny busca deshacer la relación enfermiza entre el Abuelo y Peluzín.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Tenta-Culo celebra su aniversario y hace una gran fiesta donde invita a todos, desafortunadamente durante el evento sucede un crimen y nadie puede salir hasta encontrar al responsable.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Jonathan es admitido a una reconocida escuela privada y Gaspar al no poder cubrir los gastos decide aventurarse con Peluzín en unos negocios turbios, mientras el Noruego busca consejos por parte de su familia porque no esta contento.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Gaspar pierde su trabajo y se desconecta del mundo mientras que el Abuelo y el Noruego empiezan un negocio.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Gaspar encuentra por fin el amor de manera inesperada mientras que el Pasita, triste por las limitaciones de su edad avanzada consigue la receta para la eterna juventud.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Abuelo entra en el mundo de la actuación y Peluzín es arrestado.

programme.title: La familia del barrio

programme.title: La familia del barrio

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: A criminal gang has hidden a microfilm containing the manufacturing process for artificial diamonds, developed by NASA, in one of Inspector Zenigata's molars. Determined to get his hands on that microfilm, Lupin must capture Inspector Zenigata.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Forward Hees, the world's richest man, suddenly dies a mysterious death and leaves a large ruby to Fujiko in his will. After inheriting the ruby, Fujiko comes down with the same mysterious fever as Hees…

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: A Count challenges Lupin to steal a gemstone named Dracula's Tear from on board his airship, the Hendenburg. However, also on board the ship are several formidable detectives: Homes III, Detective Archer, Koojisuke Kaneda and Inspector Zenigata.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Lupin is suffering from Transformation Sickness, an illness that transforms him into a cruel, cold-blooded criminal at the stroke of midnight, and leaves him with no recollection of his murderous crime spree in the morning…

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: A small Arab nation has received a blackmail notice. Pay a $100 million or have their oil fields blown up. Lupin targets the money, but his plans are hindered when he finds out the culprits are using human bombs.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: The Black Panther, the world's largest emerald, gets its name from the black panther that appears inside it when a light shines on it at a particular angle. After capturing this one-of-a-kind emerald, Lupin hides it in a museum to retrieve it later…

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Vault maker Marukin Safe Company is forced into bankruptcy after Lupin cracks open their impenetrable safes. To test his own skills, Marukin's son challenges Lupin to open a safe he has designed…

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: While trying to snag General Hatler's prize medallion, which contains a fifty-carat ruby, Lupin inadvertently reels in Hatler's biggest secret, his toupee! An enraged General Hatler orders Lupin and his gang to be killed.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Upon returning to Japan, Goemon finds his master on the brink of death. Furthermore, Jinkuro, a fellow disciple, had stolen half of the scroll containing the Secret Arts of the Iga Ninja. Will Goemon be able to avenge his master?

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Lupin and Jigen are in a remote area pursing a mysterious treasure, when they save a woman being chased by hoodlums. The woman invites the two back to her sister's manor, which is full of beautiful women…

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: A mysterious woman who claims to be Fujiko's aunt, gives Lupin an ultimatum: Find Marshal Rommel's lost gold or die! First, Lupin must decipher the location of the gold, written in ancient hieroglyphs.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: The great thief Nezumi-Kozou Jirokichi IV appears before Goemon and reveals that their ancestors competed in the first International Thieves Championship together, but were defeated by Lupin's grandfather, Arsène Lupin…

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: The warden of an African prison is holding Fujiko captive. Lupin and his gang infiltrate the prison and attempt to break Fujiko out, but they become the target of the Iron Lizards, robotic devices developed to chase down fugitives!

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Linda, a beautiful dancer, has stolen Jigen's heart and a vengeful Meyer has taken Fujiko hostage. Believing the women they love are in danger and unaware that Linda and Meyer are working together, Lupin and Jigen are set up to kill each other…

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: According to legend, a stamp named the Cinderella Shadow is said to make its owner a princess. Lupin and his gang pull off the heist, but a girl name Alice who also wants the stamp tags along. Will the little girl get her royal wish?

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Lupin has sent a notice declaring he will steal all the cash from every bank in Paris. Detective Melon, the granddaughter of Inspector Garimard, is chosen to catch Lupin alongside Inspector Zenigata.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Lupin has many secret techniques up his sleeve, and one of them is his Levitation Technique. In order to get their hands on this technique, a crime syndicate plots a dirty trick, where a fake Lupin tortures a man known as X8 and frames the real Lupin.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Lupin and Inspector Zenigata get kidnapped and the two are forcibly conscripted into the Foreign Legion in Morocco. Lupin and Inspector Zenigata make a run for it, but not before they're shackled together at the neck.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Beautiful Swedish twins, Latica and Anita, are engaged in a battle to the death over the Viking treasure map concealed on their backs. In disguise, Lupin learns the map's secret, but the map possesses an additional secret.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: A hit has been ordered on Lupin and Puma, a formidable hitman who specializes in long-range attacks, is on his trail! Lupin takes his chances with a close range, one-on-one showdown against Puma, but the plan seemingly backfires and Lupin is shot…

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Orion's Crown has been stolen and is up for grabs at a black-market auction. Lupin has his eyes on both the crown and the auction money, but first he must outsmart the other parties vying for the crown, including Fujiko.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: A two-thousand-year-old casket has been excavated. Inside the casket is Camilla, a beautiful woman in a near-death state, holding a golden statuette of the Virgin Mary. Lupin attempts to steal the golden statuette, but things don't go as planned…

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Lupin and his gang are attending a party in Africa, waiting for an opportunity to snatch a rare black pearl. However, their plan goes awry when a gang of gorillas crashes the party and steals the black pearl.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Massive riches have been hidden inside Tsukikage Castle. Lupin and his gang must decipher a code to find out the whereabouts of this great treasure. Wii Lupin be able to locate the treasure before his rivals do?

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Lupin and Jigen head to Mongolia in search of Genghis Khan's treasures. Meanwhile, Goemon is visiting his ancestor's grave to pay his respects when he encounters Fujiko, who is in search of Yoshitsune Minamoto's buried treasure.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: The ICPO chief promises to erase Fujiko's criminal record in exchange for her cooperation in arresting Lupin. Up against an ego-bruised Inspector Zenigata and a determined Fujiko, have Lupin's heisting days come to an end?

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Lupin and Jigen sneak on board a ship smuggling diamonds. However, what they find on board are several thousand chickens! Lupin and his gang infiltrate the Hong Kong smuggling boss's lair where diamonds are being illicitly sold…

programme.title: El precio de la historia

programme.title: Misterios de la tierra

programme.title: El show de Maury

programme.desc: ¿Probará Katrina, de 25 años, que Christopher, de 50 años, es el padre de su bebé y callará a su nueva novia, Suprina? ¿El padre del bebé de Sarah es Johnny o un hombre casado? Además, Robert niega ser padre de los bebés de dos mujeres.

programme.desc: Danica, una nueva mamá, recibió 5 correos electrónicos diferentes de 5 mujeres asegurando que se acostaron con su novio, Jimmy, en su casa. Entonces, ¿el novio de Renee preferirá su adicción a su familia?

programme.title: El show de Maury
programme.desc: Shenik y Shenequa aparecieron en el programa de Maury el año pasado después de una prueba de ADN. ¿Pero ahora Shenik se acuesta con el novio de su hermana? Además, lo único que se interpone son los resultados de la prueba del detector de mentiras.

programme.title: Gata Salvaje
programme.desc: En la clínica, tras saber del estado vegetal de Patricio, Estrella toma la decisión de otorgarle su perdón al hombre que en el pasado enloqueció a su madre.

programme.title: Gata Salvaje
programme.desc: Silvano visita a Rosaura y empieza a explicarle que se ha dado cuenta que siente amor por Jacqueline y que también sabe que Rosaura nunca va a poder olvidar a Luis Mario.

programme.title: Gata Salvaje
programme.desc: Luis Mario, junto a Rosaura, reciben la felicitación de toda la familia presente por su reconciliación. Luis Mario y Rosaura juntos le dicen a Gabrielita que por fin estarán juntos los tres.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Luffy keeps the forces out to destroy the Straw Hats at bay, however the crew needs to destroy all the mirrors - the final link that secure his safe return - on the ship in order to save themselves!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Nami and the others start breaking all the mirrors on the Sunny in order to keep their enemies out while she and Luffy discuss where to rendezvous – but little do they know the plan is overheard!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Both powerful combatants and strong users of Haki, Luffy and Katakuri are a dead match for each other. Every move is matched by their opponent! Elsewhere, the Big Mom Pirates square off against Germa!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Katakuri retires to his sanctuary to enjoy the merienda - a chance for him to savor the sweetness of his crew of chefs and replenish his Haki!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Luffy discovers the secret to Katakuri's unearthly fighting ability, and just might have a solution for how to stop him! Meanwhile, at the Sweets Factory, Pudding receives a call from Brulee who has bad news for the Straw Hats!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Luffy runs out of his Haki and has to buy some time - in the most peculiar way! Meanwhile the Big Mom Pirates mobilize their entire fleet to squelch the pirate threat, and the replacement cake nears completion!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: When Chiffon comes under attack, Sanji must choose between defending her or revealing himself to his enemies! Meanwhile, Luffy uses Brulee as a human shield to avoid the wrath of Big Mom!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Bege arrives on the scene, seemingly willing to risk it all to bring down the Big Mom Pirates in a blaze of glory, but of course he has a trick up his sleeve! Meanwhile, Luffy keeps on the move to regain his Haki!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Sanji and Bege get together and get off of Cacao Island successfully, but their plan is in jeopardy as Oven begins to boil the sea itself! As Chiffon and the others who are on the ship are cornered, a surprising savior comes in to fight Oven!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: A vicious pincer attack bears down on the Straw Hats! Three fleets converge and try to squeeze the life from them! Daifuku himself take the lead! But Carrot draws on a deep power within and springs in to action under the light of the moon!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: The much anticipated wedding cake is on its way, but there is a debate at the last minute! Shouldn't this opportunity be used to slip poison into Big Mom's meal to topple the Emperor of the Sea?

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Luffy, through sheer force of will, can almost use his Haki to battle Katakuri! Meanwhile, the Sunny catches fire while the Straw Hats try to kick out Big Mom, but that's when Jimbei steps up to the plate and takes a swing at her!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Luffy tries to enhance his Haki to foresee Katakuri's next move, but Katakuri's attacks keep pulling him down!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: The cake is finally prepared and brought before Big Mom! With the end of her vicious rampage in sight, there is a chance for the Straw Hats to flee! Big Mom's crew is forced to decide who to attack! Meanwhile, Luffy grows ever closer to using his Haki!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Hiding her presence, Flampe shoots her blowgun at Luffy to support her dear brother Katakuri. Meanwhile, Oven launches a dastardly plan to fence Luffy in - by destroying every mirror on the island!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Katakuri notices his sister Flampe is sneakily providing poison needle back up in the shadows. Becoming enraged, he takes unexpected action that surprises everyone. Meanwhile, Smoothie increases her size and closes in on the Sunny.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Luffy leans on his training to bring out the power of his Haki! Meanwhile, the children of Big Mom gather as a massive force, ready to smash Luffy and the Straw Hats. Their resentment at being embarrassed fuels their desire to get revenge!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Luffy and Katakuri are locked in a duel to end all duels! Their powers ensure that each blow could be the last! Luffy must rely on his training, let all his thoughts out, and keep pushing on! Meanwhile, Sanji is about to land at Cacao Island!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Luffy's dramatic battle finally draws to a close! But even if he is able to pull out victory in the last moment, can he remember the key to escaping the Mirrorworld?!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Luffy emerges safely! And Pekoms' bravery ensures he and the Straw Hats have a fighting chance! But can they withstand the full force of the Big Mom Pirates? At the last moment - a surprise explodes onto the scene!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Sanji tries his best to save himself and his captain, Luffy! But the arrival of Germa has complicated matters. Whose side do these powerful superhumans fight on? In the end, sisterly love will see Sanji saved!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Luffy and Sanji are safe! But the critical moment approaches - the fate of Totto Land rests on the taste of the wedding cake! Will it be sweet release or bitter defeat? Meanwhile, a cunning pincer attack leaves the Straw Hats hopelessly trapped.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: With the help of the Sun Pirates, the Straw Hats see their chance to escape! And the Sun Pirates bid farewell to their former captain. Mama finally tastes the Wedding Cake and the results are positively scrumptious!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: The Big Mom Pirates fooled! The Straw Hats have eluded their would-be tormentors with the help of the Sun Pirates! However, as the fleet of the Big Mom Pirates is still coming after them, Jimbei makes a crucial decision to help the Sunny to get away.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: At a great cost of energy and life, the Straw Hats make it out of Totto Land. Left behind in their wake are allies and friends, and would-be lovers. As the sea opens before them, what price has been paid for their escape?

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Luffy's recent exploits make their way around the world! The reputation of this mighty pirate begins to grow as all eyes look towards the Straw Hats' next move! Also - German 66 leaves an artifact behind which excites the crew!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: As the royals make their way to the Reverie, the mighty Navy takes all precautions to make sure they don't fall prey to kidnappings! At the vanguard is Koby, who glimpses Luffy's exploits and remembers their shared past.

programme.title: Gene Roddenberry's Andromeda
programme.desc: The Andromeda crew steps up to find out who killed a group of scientists and locate the kidnapped one.

programme.title: Gene Roddenberry's Andromeda
programme.desc: The crew is hired to rescue a princess from a notorious outlaw, but it is soon revealed that she was trying to escape murder at her father's hand.

programme.title: Gene Roddenberry's Andromeda
programme.desc: The Collectors now control the Commonwealth and put the Andromeda crew on trial.

programme.title: Gene Roddenberry's Andromeda
programme.desc: Andromeda discovers a shipment of bio-armor, with terrifying results.

programme.title: Gene Roddenberry's Andromeda
programme.desc: An experimental cloaking device drops Dylan in an alternate universe, where he learns how to save the Andromeda - assuming he can get back to his own reality.

programme.title: Gene Roddenberry's Andromeda
programme.desc: The Andromeda gets caught in a war between two ships that includes a fatal disease - one that Dylan picks up.

programme.title: Gene Roddenberry's Andromeda
programme.desc: Dylan is tricked by Rev and kidnapped. The crew finds an "unexpected ally" in a Collector.

programme.title: Gene Roddenberry's Andromeda
programme.desc: The Abyss has infected Beka. The crew must find a way to save her.

programme.title: Gene Roddenberry's Andromeda
programme.desc: After some of the crew is captured, Harper is forced to work on a time bridge for the Patriarch.

programme.title: Gene Roddenberry's Andromeda
programme.desc: A spy from Tri Gemma shows up on the Andromeda in an attempt to steal the Star Map.

programme.title: Gene Roddenberry's Andromeda
programme.desc: When Rommie becomes too emotional, the ship cuts her access in order to run diagnostics. This leaves the ship vulnerable to a Magog attack.

programme.title: Gene Roddenberry's Andromeda
programme.desc: The Abyss kills Beka's friend, and the crew must figure out what information they killed for.

programme.title: Gene Roddenberry's Andromeda
programme.desc: Andromeda rescues a ship returning from peace talks with the Magog. An attack is coming.

programme.title: Gene Roddenberry's Andromeda
programme.desc: The Magog attack has dire consequences. The Andromeda is destroyed, Trance and Dylan are presumed the only survivors, and Dylan escapes into the Route of Ages.

programme.title: In Ice Cold Blood
programme.desc: A foursome, a stripper, and a biker, is just the beginning for investigators of this massage table homicide; everyone is shocked as a secret fetish for murder is revealed.

programme.title: In Ice Cold Blood
programme.desc: A single mother is found shot and stabbed in her kitchen; multiple suspects emerge, but the true mastermind of this murder hits closer to home than anyone expected.

programme.title: In Ice Cold Blood
programme.desc: What started as a perfect marriage evolves into a threesome; after one of the participants winds up dead, the killer turns out to be someone the investigators never suspected.

programme.title: In Ice Cold Blood
programme.desc: When a psychic and her adult daughter are found killed under bizarre circumstances, the list of suspects grows long as investigators discover that male escorts, blackmail, fraud and love spells all played a part in this chilling double murder.

programme.title: In Ice Cold Blood
programme.desc: A mom starts online dating to try and cope after an unexpected tragedy, but when she gets pulled into the underbelly of the BDSM world and then disappears, investigators spend over a year unraveling this dark mystery.

programme.title: In Ice Cold Blood
programme.desc: A loving grandmother from a traveling community is found brutally murdered, shocking all; investigators soon uncover a web of lies, identity theft and millions in insurance fraud that point to who killed this sweet old lady.

programme.title: In Ice Cold Blood
programme.desc: When a man is shot dead in bed right next to his fiancée, detectives learn that anyone's past can come back to haunt them.

programme.title: In Ice Cold Blood
programme.desc: A young mother is brutally murdered but despite unique evidence at the scene, it takes years to put the pieces together and bring her killer to justice.

programme.title: In Ice Cold Blood
programme.desc: A wealthy entrepreneur is shot in his home; there are many suspects but with only suspicion to go on, it takes investigators over seven years to nab his killer.

programme.title: In Ice Cold Blood
programme.desc: Lust and greed are at the core of the case of a wife and mother who is found dead in her pool; investigators are quick to uncover a web of affairs, lies and fraud that lead them to her killer.

programme.title: In Ice Cold Blood
programme.desc: A single mother is found dead in a hotel stairwell and detectives quickly uncover that she had a secret life that may have led to her demise.

programme.title: In Ice Cold Blood
programme.desc: When a police officer goes missing, it becomes apparent he is the victim of a jealous wrath.

programme.title: In Ice Cold Blood
programme.desc: Three members of a wealthy family are gunned down in their own home; with little evidence to go on, investigators embark on a multi-year surveillance operation to see if they can prove their instincts are correct.

programme.title: In Ice Cold Blood
programme.desc: A beloved entrepreneur is murdered in his office; a secret double life is quickly revealed, and despite mountains of suspicion, lies and motives, his killer is not who one would assume.

programme.title: In Ice Cold Blood
programme.desc: A man is found dead in the shower, and police have only two suspects, but to figure out who killed him and why, is not as cut and dry as it may seem.

programme.title: In Ice Cold Blood
programme.desc: A teenage girl is found beaten to death at the neighborhood pool, launching her father on a mission to catch her killer that ultimately changes crime fighting forever.

programme.title: PAW Patrol
programme.desc: Ryder and the PAW Patrol rescue a lost kitty from the bay, but who will save them from all the mayhem she causes?/Ryder, Rubble, and Rocky call in Chase to help them free Katie and Cali's train from a rockslide!

programme.title: PAW Patrol
programme.desc: The PAW Patrol must work quickly to fix the tracks and remove a train car at the Adventure Bay Train Station, before the next train comes./Ryder and the PAW Patrol battle the clock to fix the lighthouse.

programme.title: PAW Patrol
programme.desc: Marshal gets a new BFF when a gosling he names "Fuzzy" takes a liking to him. /When Mayor Goodway accidentally takes off in a hot air balloon, Ryder and the Paw Patrol must make a dramatic rescue to save her and win the race!

programme.title: PAW Patrol
programme.desc: Ryder and the PAW Patrol need to rescue Alex on Jakes mountain./The pups find strange footprints in the snow on the mountain outside Adventure Bay. Everyone thinks it's a "snow monster" and it's scaring the skiers away.

programme.title: PAW Patrol
programme.desc: Ryder gets a call from the Circus ringmaster - Ellie the baby elephant has escaped from the circus train! /Mayor Goodway's purse chicken "Chickaletta" has gone missing. Ryder and the Paw Patrol search Adventure bay.

programme.title: PAW Patrol
programme.desc: Ryder and the PAW Patrol have to rescue Alex when he takes off on his new "super trike"./Marshall proves he is a true hero when he stops to put out a real fire on the beach during a race against the clock for a trophy.

programme.title: PAW Patrol
programme.desc: Mr. Porters van full of puppy food slides on the ice near the shore; Ryder and the PAW Patrol must save the day!/Katie and her cat Cali are on the chair lift when it stops leaving them above the ski hill with no way to get down!

programme.title: PAW Patrol
programme.desc: It's Halloween! Capt'n Turbot has decorated an old wreck as a pirate ship for a town party. When the ship mysteriously heads out to sea captained by a "ghost" Ryder and the Paw Patrol must save the ship and discover the ghost!

programme.title: PAW Patrol
programme.desc: When Santa's Sleigh crashes and the reindeer run off - Ryder and the PAW PATROL have to help Santa finish delivering presents and save Christmas!

programme.title: PAW Patrol
programme.desc: We see a flashback of how Rubble became a member of the Paw Patrol!/When Wally the Walrus gets tangled in an old fishing net, Ryder and the Paw Patrol need to get him to the surface and back to shore safely.

programme.title: PAW Patrol
programme.desc: Farmer Yumi's carrots are disappearing and she calls Ryder and the Paw Patrol for help. /Katie is excited to be entering one of the Paw Patrol pups into a puppy grooming competition "Puptacular" in the next town.

programme.title: PAW Patrol
programme.desc: Ryder and the PAW Patrol clean up a small oil spill in the water near Adventure Bay. /When Adventure Bay's famous statue ends up at the bottom of the Bay, Ryder and the PAW Patrol have to help Mayor Goodway bring it back!

programme.title: PAW Patrol
programme.desc: It's Adventure Bay Western Days, when a herd of cows escape from a train at the railway station!/When their friend Alex decides he wants to be a member of the PAW Patrol the PUPS and Ryder let him come along for the ride.

programme.title: PAW Patrol
programme.desc: When Cap'n Turbot's boat runs aground, Ryder, Zuma, Skye, and Rocky must team up to save it before it sinks!/The PAW Patrol must pick all Farmer Yumi's fruit before an early snowstorm comes! But how can Chase help?

programme.title: Ancient Egyptian Family Feud
programme.desc: How did a female pharaoh and a young king bring about the final days of the Ramesside family? We investigate the end of Egypt's largest family and how the legacy of Ramses the great came to an abrupt end.

programme.title: Egypt's Lost Queens
programme.desc: Prof. Joann Fletcher explores what it was like to be a woman of power in ancient Egypt. This programme brings to life the remarkable leadership and influence wielded by women whose levels of freedom were unique in the ancient world.

programme.title: Mummies: Secrets of the Pharaohs
programme.desc: Journey to the royal tombs of Egypt and explore the history of ancient Egyptian society as told through the mummies of the past. The film follows explorers and scientists as they piece together the archeological and genetic clues of Egyptian mummies.

programme.title: Lost Treasures Of The Ancient World: Ancient Egypt
programme.desc: This program visits, explores and restores such wonders as the Temples at Al Karnak and Luxor, the Temple at Abu Simnel and more.

programme.title: Raiders of the Lost Gold
programme.desc: Wherever the Japanese conquered, they looted. Some say the treasure was the greatest-ever collected in history, consisting of gem-stones, platinum, and gold. At today's values, they estimate the treasure to have been worth over US $100 billion.

programme.title: Raiders of the Lost Gold
programme.desc: After years of quiet, dogged searching, a small syndicate of treasure hunters claim to have found several sites. It is Indiana Jones in reality involving the Japanese criminal, Yoshio Kodama; General Tomyuki Yamashita; and the Japanese Imperial family.

programme.title: The Egyptians
programme.desc: Built for pharaoh Khufu over 4,500 years ago, the Great Pyramid of Giza is the only one of the Seven Wonders still standing today - and is by far the most famous of all pyramids!

programme.title: The Egyptians
programme.desc: Builder of the third pyramid of Giza, Menkaure erected a smaller, more modest pyramid than those of his two predecessors. But this discreet gem is perhaps the most revealing of them all.

programme.title: The Egyptians
programme.desc: In Saqqara desert, south of Cairo, stands a little-known monument whose walls are covered with exceptional texts: the pyramid of Pepi II – Egypt's longest reigning pharaoh.

programme.title: The Egyptians
programme.desc: The ancient Black Pyramid, dating back 1,800 years, appears ruinous yet harbors intricate underground tunnels. Egyptologist Lark Lenher delves into these passageways, revealing impressive artifacts.

programme.title: The Egyptians
programme.desc: We find extraordinary graphic representations on sarcophagi, papyrus scrolls, the walls of tombs and other buildings.

programme.title: The Egyptians
programme.desc: Two hundred years ago, Jean-François Champollion deciphered the Egyptian hieroglyphs for the first time, thus solving one of the greatest enigmas in the history of humanity.

programme.title: The Egyptians
programme.desc: Archaeologist Zahi Hawass has been excavating the ancient necropolis of Saqqara, south of Cairo, for several decades.

programme.title: The Haunting
programme.desc: In this edge-of-your-seat supernatural thriller featuring Hollywood's hottest stars, a study in fear escalates into a heart-stopping nightmare for a professor and three subjects trapped in a mysterious mansion.

programme.title: Pet Sematary (1989)
programme.desc: For most families, moving is a new beginning. But for the Creeds, it could be the beginning of the end. Because they've just moved in next door to a place that children built with broken dreams, the Pet Sematary.

programme.title: May
programme.desc:
May grew up as a lonely oddball whose only friend was a perfectly kept doll. When she moves to L.A., she takes up with a handsome filmmaker and then an alluring lesbian, but every connection she makes turns out deadly.
Rated R

programme.title: Pulse
programme.desc: When their computer hacker friend accidentally channels a mysterious wireless signal, a group of co-eds rally to stop a terrifying evil from taking over the world.

programme.title: The Reading
programme.desc: After a deadly home invasion, Emma (Mo'Nique Hicks) copes by writing a book, but when a young psychic and her team perform a reading in her home, a new terror is unleashed.

programme.title: The Uninvited
programme.desc: Based on Kim Jee-Woon's 2003 Korean horror film. Two sisters return home to their father from a mental institution, whose recovery is hindered by their cruel stepmother.

programme.title: Silent Hill

programme.title: Days of Thunder
programme.desc: Discovered by businessman Tim Daland, Cole is teamed with legendary crew chief and car-builder Harry Hogge to race for the Winston Cup at the Daytona 500. A crash nearly ends Cole’s career and he must turn to a beautiful doctor to regain his nerve.

programme.title: A Few Good Men
programme.desc: Tom Cruise stars as a brash Navy lawyer who's teamed with a gung-ho litigator (Demi Moore) in a politically explosive murder case, defending two Marines accused of killing a fellow soldier

programme.title: Jerry Maguire
programme.desc: Jerry Maguire is a sports agent who is brought to a point of crisis in his life when he decides to become an honorable man. Follow his journey to redemption through an unlikely alliance with a female accountant, and his least important client.

programme.title: The Firm
programme.desc: Mitch joins a prosperous Memphis firm that affords Mitch and his wife an affluent lifestyle beyond their wildest dreams. But when FBI agents confront him with evidence of corruption and murder within the firm, Mitch sets out to find the truth.

programme.title: Top Gun

programme.title: Intervention
programme.desc: Suffering post-traumatic stress after being molested as a child, Mindie developed a drug habit in her teens that gave way to full-on meth addiction in her 20s.

programme.title: Dr. G: Medical Examiner
programme.desc: Rebecca Davis is found dead in her bed after she fails to show up for work. Dr. G must race against the clock to find out what took this young woman’s life.

programme.title: Dr. G: Medical Examiner

programme.title: Dr. G: Medical Examiner
programme.desc: A pregnant teen is admitted to a mental hospital after threatening suicide but is found dead days later. Dr. G must dig deep to uncover what took Claudia’s life.

programme.title: Dr. G: Medical Examiner

programme.desc: A former prom queen disappears into the murky Florida swamps.

programme.title: I Shouldn't Be Alive

programme.title: I Shouldn't Be Alive

programme.title: I Shouldn't Be Alive
programme.desc: In April 2004, Arthur Taylor, Alistair Gellatly, Arthur's wife Fay and parents Clive and Brenda become stranded in the hippo and crocodile-infested Zambezi River when their watercraft is rammed by a mad hippo and sinks.

programme.title: Decisive Battles of Hitler's War
programme.desc: When Hitler claimed restitution of Sudetenland, France, and Britain abandoned their ally. Ignoring offers to help defend the Czechs, French leaders met with Hitler in Munich in Sep. 1938.

programme.title: Decisive Battles of Hitler's War

programme.title: Decisive Battles of Hitler's War
programme.desc: To Adolf Hitler in 1940, Britain was no more than an irritant on his periphery to his rapidly expanding Third Reich.

programme.title: Impossible Peace
programme.desc: In the 20s there seemed to be some good candidates for leadership in Europe. But where were these people when the great depression hits, affecting the lives of people around the world?

programme.title: Impossible Peace
programme.desc: As the effect of the depression in the US became clear, Japanese businessmen began to think that America would never recover. They then set their focus on East Asia, where the invasion of Manchuria had doubled the size of the Japanese empire.

programme.title: Impossible Peace
programme.desc: No one knows for sure if early action would have stopped Adolph Hitler's ambition. But we do know that inaction certainly didn't. Buy why did neighboring countries refuse to act early? One word: Appeasement.

programme.title: Impossible Peace

programme.title: World of WarShips Clash of Titans

programme.title: World of WarShips Clash of Titans

programme.title: World of WarShips Clash of Titans

programme.title: The Finest Hours Of WWII

programme.desc: Helena está viva, porque nunca se subió al barco que pensaba abordar, por el momento Germán es el único que sabe esto. Efraín debe escapar con su esposa, por la deuda de juego.

programme.title: La ronca de Oro
programme.desc: Helena sigue su recorrido para llegar a su casa, y ayudada por Pepe, consigue una cita con un Productor musical. Efraín regresa a la casa.

programme.title: La ronca de Oro
programme.desc: Helena comienza a trabajar en un restaurante para sobrevivir y sigue ilusionada por la supuesta gira que va a comenzar. Efraín y su esposa planean que Ana Julia no acepte más a Helena.

programme.title: Corazón apasionado
programme.desc: Patricia visita a Armando sin avisarle a su abuela Úrsula, ella va a buscarla y la obliga a regresar a casa. Después, Patricia pide disculpas por actuar por su cuenta.

programme.desc: Felipe le dice a Armando que quieren hacerle daño, a su padre y a don Alejandro, el dueño de la hacienda “El recuerdo”. Por recomendación de Armando, doña Úrsula solicitó una auditoría a don Ignacio.

programme.title: Corazón apasionado

programme.title: Corazón apasionado
programme.desc: Alejandro regresa del pueblo a su hacienda. Mariela está mal asesorada por Fedora y se dirige a una fiesta organizada por Jony. Emperatriz besa a Diego y afirma que será un último beso.

programme.title: La ronca de Oro

programme.title: Undercover Boss

programme.desc: Archer and T'Pol encounter the Syrrannites, a radical group hiding in the Vulcan desert, while the NX-01 crew contends with Vulcan power ploys.

programme.desc: Archer, T'Pol and T'Pau attempt to bring the Kir'Shara an artifact believed to contain Surak's original writings to the Vulcan capital, as the NX-01 gets involved in a Vulcan-Andorian military clash.

programme.title: Star Trek: Enterprise
programme.desc: The inventor of the transporter, Emory Erickson, comes aboard Enterprise for a risky experiment.

programme.title: Star Trek: Enterprise
programme.desc: Noncorporeal aliens study the Enterprise crew as they respond to a fatal viral infection brought on board from an away mission.

programme.title: Star Trek: Enterprise
programme.desc: Enterprise journeys to Babel with a Tellarite ambassador on board for peace talks with the Andorians, when a distress call from Shran is received.

programme.title: Star Trek: Enterprise
programme.desc: Archer tries to unify the Andorians, Tellarites and Vulcans in a plan to capture a marauder ship threatening to destabilize the region.

programme.title: Engineering Connections
programme.desc: Richard Hammond checks out the world’s tallest and most distinctively shaped hotel – the 320 metre high Burj al Arab, or Arabian Tower.

programme.title: Engineering Connections
programme.desc: Richard Hammond reveals the surprising engineering connections in Japan’s Bullet Train – the world’s first high-speed train.

programme.title: Megastructures
programme.desc: China has erected some of the greatest monuments on Earth. When they held the Olympic Games in Beijing, the main stadium was a feat of architectural beauty. It was up to engineers to design the Beijing Water Cube to match it.

programme.title: Megastructures
programme.desc: Take 60,000 tons of steel, 260,000 cubic meters of concrete, 2,000 dedicated Chinese workers, and some of the best design brains in the business, and the Shanghai World Financial Center is what you get.

programme.title: Megastructures
programme.desc: In 2002 Chinese engineers and workers tackled one of the biggest construction projects on Earth. Thirty kilometers out to sea, in the middle of the ocean, is the location for Yangshan Deep Water Port.

programme.title: Megastructures
programme.desc: Typhoon winds to withstand, a rigid deadline to meet, and a towering goal no skyscraper has ever reached. The Pearl River Tower even generates its own power; it is the holy grail for mechanical engineers.

programme.title: Megastructures
programme.desc: Building one of the world’s tallest TV towers, the Guangzhou Sightseeing and TV Tower (now called the Canton Tower).

programme.title: Ancient Engineering
programme.desc: How gold is mined and transformed into everyday objects like jewelry and currency.

programme.title: Ancient Engineering
programme.desc: Exploring some of history's most ingenious, yet lesser-known engineering solutions.

programme.title: Ancient Engineering
programme.desc: Exploring how ancient Egyptian engineers built the monumental Great Pyramid at Giza.

programme.title: Ancient Engineering
programme.desc: As far back as the Bronze Age, humans were building ships capable of crossing oceans and trading.

programme.title: Naked Science
programme.desc: The earth is 4.5 billion years old and it is slowly dying. Tectonic activity is slowly cooling the planet – the continents will eventually move together to form a new supercontinent called Pangea Ultima.

programme.title: Naked Science
programme.desc: Stephen Hawking, though suffering from amyotrophic lateral sclerosis has developed a unique understanding of the universe.

programme.title: Saving Private Ryan
programme.desc: A World War II captain (Tom Hanks) and his squad (Edward Burns, Tom Sizemore) risk all to locate and send home a soldier whose three brothers died in combat.

programme.title: American Outlaws
programme.desc: When a Midwest town learns that a corrupt railroad baron has captured the deeds to their homesteads without their knowledge, young ranchers join forces to take back what is rightfully theirs.

programme.title: Amistad
programme.desc: AMISTAD is about a 1839 mutiny onboard a slave ship that is traveling towards the Northeast Coast of America. Much of the story involves a court-room drama about the slave who led the revolt.

programme.title: Saving Private Ryan
programme.desc: A World War II captain (Tom Hanks) and his squad (Edward Burns, Tom Sizemore) risk all to locate and send home a soldier whose three brothers died in combat.

programme.title: The Matrix
programme.desc: When a beautiful stranger leads computer hacker Neo to a forbidding underworld, he discovers the life he knows is the elaborate deception of an evil cyber-intelligence. Every second becomes a fight to stay alive - to escape The Matrix.

programme.title: Pokemon: Johto League Champions
programme.desc: After losing to Whitney at the Goldenrod Gym, Ash is thinking of a rematch with her powerful Miltank. When Whitney suggests a trip to a Miltank dairy, it’s just the chance he's is looking for!

programme.title: Pokemon: Johto League Champions
programme.desc: With his new Gym badge in hand, Ash is asked to appear on a local radio station. But while he's acting out a radio drama with some 'professional actors,' the scripted danger becomes all too lifelike!

programme.title: Pokemon: Johto League Champions
programme.desc: A Bug Pokémon Catching Contest turns into a hive of activity when Ash goes up against his rival Casey—and it isn’t long before the Team Rocket villains swarm the scene, intent on catching a few things for themselves…

programme.title: Pokemon: Johto League Champions
programme.desc: On the way to Ecruteak City, our heroes are trapped on the wrong side of a river. To get across, they first have to find a Sudowoodo...which, even for an expert, is no easy feat!

programme.title: Pokemon: Johto League Champions
programme.desc: When an ex-student of Professor Oak’s discovers some restored Omanyte and Omastar in the wild, our heroes are called into action to save these prehistoric Pokémon from harsh times with Team Rocket!

programme.title: Pokemon: Johto League Champions
programme.desc: The Pidgey Express courier service is in need of our heroes' helping hands, especially when Team Rocket wants to have the delivery Pidgey signed, sealed, and delivered to the Boss!

programme.title: Pokemon: Johto League Champions
programme.desc: Caught in a sudden downpour, our heroes find a castle clinic that uses Pokémon healers to help patients. But when Brock and the doctor end up trapped in the castle's labyrinth, a helping hand is needed to get them out!

programme.title: Pokemon: Johto League Champions
programme.desc: After meeting the elderly owner of a Pokémon dojo, Ash is called upon to replace the man's granddaughter as the chosen heir! But when a vicious challenger approaches, can Ash help defend the dojo from destruction?

programme.title: Pokemon: Johto League Champions
programme.desc: Chikorita, Cyndaquil, and Totodile find themselves separated from the group and stuck in a ravine! When Meowth finds himself stuck too, an unlikely partnership forms!

programme.title: Pokemon: Johto League Champions
programme.desc: Misty is reeled into a rivalry at a local Seaking fishing competition. Can she come out on top?

programme.title: Pokemon: Johto League Champions
programme.desc: A Pokémon breeding contest gives our heroes a chance to compete, greet an old friend, and defeat Team Rocket once again!

programme.title: Pokemon: Johto League Champions
programme.desc: When Ash comes down with a serious stomachache far from any hospital, a local healer and his Shuckle companions are on task to set him right!

programme.title: Pokemon: Johto League Champions
programme.desc: A run-in with his longtime rival Gary leaves Ash in a bad mood. But when Team Rocket’s latest weapon starts terrorizing the local Pokémon Center, Ash might have to turn to him for help!

programme.title: Pokemon: Johto League Champions
programme.desc: After our heroes meet a mountain patrol and their Ledian partners, they'll have to help protect the mountain from a destructive Team Rocket attack!

programme.title: Pokemon: Johto League Champions
programme.desc: The peace and quiet of a Wobbuffet festival is interrupted by some hooligans picking a fight. Pokémon battles are banned during the festival, so how can our heroes defend the town?

programme.title: Pokemon: Johto League Champions
programme.desc: Ash and the gang are happy to see Duplica again...but not as happy as the Team Rocket trio, when they discover her newest Ditto’s tiny transformations!

programme.title: Pokemon: Johto League Champions
programme.desc: A Snubbull falls into a Team Rocket trap, and the villains try to ransom it back to its wealthy Trainer. But when the Pokémon fights back, Jessie, James, and Meowth might be the ones in trouble!

programme.title: Pokemon: Johto League Champions
programme.desc: On their way to Ecruteak City, our heroes must help a familiar Trainer and her Ariados defend a martial arts center from a rampaging Team Rocket!

programme.title: Pokemon: Johto League Champions
programme.desc: When a young Trainer’s Yanma accidentally destroys his father’s precious glasswork, it inspires a Team Rocket scheme that will shatter the peace and quiet of the town!

programme.title: Pokemon: Johto League Champions
programme.desc: Hearing of a nearby Grass-type Pokémon tournament, Ash decides to enter...and a rivalry soon begins to bloom amid the heat of battle!

programme.title: Pokemon: Johto League Champions

programme.title: Pokemon: Johto League Champions
programme.desc: When the smoke clears after their latest run-in with Team Rocket, our heroes quickly realize that Togepi is missing! As they begin the search, Togepi has started making friends in another part of the forest.

programme.title: Pokemon: Johto League Champions
programme.desc: Finally reaching Ecruteak City, our heroes set out to find the Gym, but wind up inside a decaying tower instead. Suddenly, the tower bursts into flames with our heroes trapped inside! How can they escape?

programme.title: Pokemon: Johto League Champions
programme.desc: It is finally time for Ash’s fourth Gym battle! After seeing Morty’s powerful Gengar in action, Ash is under no illusions about how tough these Ghost-type Pokémon will be! Can he claim the Fog Badge?

programme.title: Pokemon: Johto League Champions
programme.desc: When our heroes meet five beautiful sisters in a cultural garden, they are soon challenged to a series of testing battles involving Eevee and some of its evolved forms!

programme.title: Pokemon: Johto League Champions
programme.desc: A mischievous flock of Murkrow cause trouble for Ash and Team Rocket by stealing some of their most prized possessions! Now, the race is on to get them back!

programme.title: Pokemon: Johto League Champions

programme.title: Pokemon: Johto League Champions
programme.desc: There’s a food thief amongst our heroes...could it have anything to do with the cute and cuddly Teddiursa who has joined them on their journey?

programme.title: Pokemon: Johto League Champions
programme.desc: When our heroes are reunited with Pokémon photographer Todd Snap, he starts them on an adventure to find the Legendary Pokémon Articuno!

programme.title: Pokemon: Johto League Champions
programme.desc: Still searching for Articuno, our heroes are found by a trio of keen-nosed, snuffling Swinub, and Team Rocket are keen on sniffing them out for profit!

programme.title: Pokemon: Johto League Champions
programme.desc: Our heroes have finally found Articuno, but they’ve led Team Rocket right to the Legendary Pokémon as well!

programme.title: Cops

programme.title: Cops

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: Un conductor de grúa no le devuelve su auto a una mujer, por lo cual ella decide agredirlo con un bate. Un hombre asegura que la metanfetamina es medicinal y está dispuesto a defender su postura.

programme.title: Cops

programme.title: Cops

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: Un policía juega al portero cuando atrapa a un ladrón corriendo hacia él. Víctimas de ladrones armados describen con detalle el crimen que se grabó. Oficiales hacen entrega de unos niños llorando a su madre.

programme.title: StarTalk: Down to a Science
programme.desc: Neil deGrasse Tyson and Chuck Nice look at the connection between science and art in Van Gogh's Starry Night; they are joined by art historian Roberta Olson, astronomer Jay Pasachoff, and neuroscientist Heather Berlin.

programme.title: StarTalk Things You Thought You Knew
programme.desc: Neil deGrasse Tyson and Chuck explore the rise of telescopes from Earth; they discuss the Webb.

programme.title: StarTalk Cosmic Queries
programme.desc: Neil deGrasse Tyson and co-host Jordan answer questions about solar system formation, dark matter, and more.

programme.title: StarTalk With Neil deGrasse Tyson
programme.desc: Neil deGrasse Tyson and co-host Chuck Nice answer questions about moon landing and space race.

programme.title: Stargate Atlantis
programme.desc: Sheppard and the team visits the planet Taranis at the invitation of two leading citizens, Dr. Norina Pero and Chancellor Lycus, who want McKay to repair a failing shield generator at an Ancient base, and Ancient warship, they've discovered.

programme.title: Stargate Atlantis
programme.desc: Kenmore arrives back in Atlantis with a group of Wraith, in the midst of a civil war. Kenmore, hoping to leverage his knowledge of Atlantis against Sheppard and the team, suggests a trade; Beckett's serum, in exchange for keeping Atlantis hidden.

programme.title: Stargate Universe
programme.desc: Col. Young (Louis Ferreira) is plagued by a recurring vision wherein Destiny is attacked and destroyed by aliens. After placing the crew on high alert, he starts to feel that he may be losing his mind and questions his ability as the commander!

programme.title: Stargate Universe
programme.desc: When Destiny comes upon a heavily damaged ship, Dr. Rush and Col. Young decide to make a dangerous space-suited expedition to the ship. But an unexpected turn of events leaves Dr. Rush and Col. Young stranded aboard the strange vessel.

programme.title: Stargate Universe
programme.desc: Lucian Alliance prisoner Simeon escapes, creating a manhunt on a remote planet. But Homeworld Command orders he be captured alive, believing Simeon has valuable information. Simeon must be brought back to the Destiny before he kills or is killed.

programme.title: Stargate Universe
programme.desc: With no recollection of how they got to the Destiny, crew members left behind over a year earlier make a mysterious return. After an unsettling turn, the memories stirred through regression therapy prove disastrous for those who’ve returned.

programme.title: Stargate SG-1
programme.desc: When a planned ambush goes disastrously wrong, resulting in fatalities among the SG-1 team, the peace-loving Nox restore them to life. But while these gentle people can bring back the dead, can they resist the deadly technology of the Goa'uld?

programme.title: Stargate SG-1
programme.desc: On the mysterious planet Argos, the beautiful Kynthia seduces Colonel Jack O'Neill, which means he's condemned to an Argosian lifespan of only a hundred days. As he turns gray, will his team succeed in their frantic search for a cure?

programme.title: Stargate SG-1
programme.desc: Looking for allies against the Goa'uld, the SG-1 team lands on Cimmeria, home of the legendary Norse gods. Teal'c and O'Neill are transported to an underground labyrinth of caves of the vicious creature Unas. Can Carter & Daniel rescue them?

programme.title: Stargate SG-1
programme.desc: Dr. Daniel Jackson discovers that in 1945, a young professor slipped through the Stargate, never to return. Together with his still living fiancée, the SG-1 team discovers the now aged professor trapped in a decaying fortress.

programme.title: Stargate SG-1
programme.desc: With the proviso that he bring back a Goa'uld larva for study, Teal'c (Christopher Judge) returns to Chulak to stop the Goa'uld from enslaving his son Rya'c. Trouble is, Rya'c needs a larva to survive - and the only one available is Teal'c's.

programme.title: Stargate SG-1
programme.desc: The SG-1 team returns from the planet Oannes in a panic and minus Daniel Jackson, who was last seen being consumed by a column of flames. But as his comrades mourn him on Earth, Daniel is the captive of an amphibious humanoid creature known as Nem.

programme.title: Stargate SG-1
programme.desc: The evil Goa'uld Hathor (Suanne Braun) escapes from a Mayan pyramid in Mexico. At the Stargate facility, she uses her charms to seduce the men into helping her take over the world. Can Samantha Carter and her female colleagues defeat her?

programme.title: Stargate SG-1
programme.desc: Capt. Carter returns with the sole survivor of a planetary plague - a little girl, Cassandra. As they become attached, Carter discovers the girl's terrible secret - a time bomb implanted by the Goa'uld. Can she save the girl - and the world?

programme.title: Halt and Catch Fire
programme.desc: Donna and Cameron have a hard time coming to a mutual agreement on their acquisition. Gordon discovers the importance of teamwork through laser-tag.

programme.title: Halt and Catch Fire
programme.desc: Donna and Gordon decide to treat themselves to vacation at home instead of camping. Bos and Cameron return to Texas. Ryan and Joe have a revelation.

programme.title: Halt and Catch Fire
programme.desc: Tensions rise over an offer to buy Mutiny. Donna has a weekend alone, while Gordon and Cam bond over video games. Joe has a standoff with the board.

programme.title: Halt and Catch Fire

programme.title: The Making of the Mob

programme.title: Into the Badlands
programme.desc: Pilgrim leads the hunt for near-fatally wounded Sunny. The Widow confronts her inner demons in an attempt to restore her Gift.

programme.title: Into the Badlands
programme.desc: Sunny and Nix seek information that could destroy Pilgrim. The Widow and Bajie team up with the Master. M.K. leads Pilgrim to a great source of power.

programme.title: Into the Badlands
programme.desc: The Widow and Baron Chau finally face off. M.K. and Pilgrim grow their forces at the Monastery. Sunny and Bajie discover a new foe, the Black Lotus.

programme.title: Into the Badlands
programme.desc: Sunny discovers an important figure from his past is working with the Black Lotus. The Widow, Gaius, and Tilda bring an end to the bloody civil war.

programme.title: Into the Badlands

programme.title: Into the Badlands

programme.title: Into the Badlands

programme.title: Orphan Black
